data.name: 约拍女神 · 制服狩猎
data.detailed_description:
· This is a role-playing game.

Players will play as a photographer to find and meet strange beautiful women, convince them to become their models, and take photos for them.

In a subway station, the player plays the photographer to know three beautiful office ladys. After meeting them for a photo shoot, the story began.

· Players experience the story in the form of an interactive novel.

· The player can make choices to into different stories.

· Players can control the camera during the camera session.
data.about_the_game:
· This is a role-playing game.

Players will play as a photographer to find and meet strange beautiful women, convince them to become their models, and take photos for them.

In a subway station, the player plays the photographer to know three beautiful office ladys. After meeting them for a photo shoot, the story began.

· Players experience the story in the form of an interactive novel.

· The player can make choices to into different stories.

· Players can control the camera during the camera session.
data.short_description: In the subway station, there are often beautiful office lady wearing stockings and short skirts. And I, as a good photographer, need to capture that beauty. Go - Strike out -- tie them up and shoot!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1080
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
